subcodes.first_line: O ye who, with resolute steps, turn toward the mercy of your Lord, the All-Merciful! Be wakeful and arise from your places of repose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المتوجهون السابقون الی رحمه ربکم الرحمن انتبهوا و استیقظوا من مضاجع
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
